untranslatable_reason: BARR Bottom pattern requires trend line identification and geometric analysis (peaks following downtrend line, orderly decline characterization, throwback confirmation). These require multi-bar trend line construction and relative positioning analysis not available in the allowed indicator set. The pattern's core detection depends on visual/geometric properties that cannot be expressed using only the provided indicators and operators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using high-volume rapid price drop (entry) and brief rebound (exit) as proxy signals for BARR Bottom failure mode. However, the full pattern requires: (1) identifying initial ascent to new high, (2) constructing and validating a downtrend line through subsequent peaks, (3) detecting the 'bump' as a specific deviation from orderly decline, (4) confirming price slice through trend line. These geometric/trend-line dependent elements cannot be accurately represented with point-in-time indicator values. A proper implementation would require custom trend-line detection logic outside the standard indicator framework.
